name: Modern Editor
format:
Créer / Modifier badge
Début et fin peuvent être le même jour.
Même jour autorisé. Exemple : début 08/04/2026 08:00 et fin 08/04/2026 12:00.

name: Handle editor actions
func: function normalizeUid(uid){uid=String(uid||'').trim().toUpperCase();let out='';for(let i=0;i<uid.length;i++){let c=uid[i];if((c>='0'&&c<='9')||(c>='A'&&c<='F')) out+=c;}return out;}function cleanDateOnly(v){if(v===undefined||v===null) return '';if(Object.prototype.toString.call(v)==='[object Date]'&&!isNaN(v)){let y=v.getFullYear();let m=String(v.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');let d=String(v.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');return y+'-'+m+'-'+d;}v=String(v).trim();if(!v) return '';if(v.includes('T')) return v.substring(0,10);if(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(v)) return v;if(/^\d{2}\/\d{2}\/\d{4}$/.test(v)){let p=v.split('/');return p[2]+'-'+p[1]+'-'+p[0];}return '';}function cleanTimeOnly(v){if(v===undefined||v===null) return '';if(Object.prototype.toString.call(v)==='[object Date]'&&!isNaN(v)){let h=String(v.getHours()).padStart(2,'0');let m=String(v.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');return h+':'+m;}v=String(v).trim();if(!v) return '';if(v.includes('T')){let m=v.match(/T(\d{2}):(\d{2})/);if(m) return m[1]+':'+m[2];}if(/^\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}$/.test(v)) return v.substring(0,5);if(/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/.test(v)) return v;return '';}function toEpochLocal(dateStr,timeStr){dateStr=cleanDateOnly(dateStr);timeStr=cleanTimeOnly(timeStr);if(!dateStr||!timeStr) return 0;let partsD=dateStr.split('-');let partsT=timeStr.split(':');let y=parseInt(partsD[0],10);let m=parseInt(partsD[1],10);let d=parseInt(partsD[2],10);let hh=parseInt(partsT[0],10);let mm=parseInt(partsT[1],10);let dt=new Date(y,m-1,d,hh,mm,0,0);if(isNaN(dt.getTime())) return 0;return Math.floor(dt.getTime()/1000);}let db=global.get('rfid_db','file')||[];db=db.map(card=>{card.uid=normalizeUid(card.uid);return card;});let p=msg.payload||{};let action=String(p.action||'');let rawUid=String(p.uid||(p.data&&p.data.uid)||'').trim().toUpperCase();let uid=normalizeUid(rawUid);if(action==='list'){global.set('rfid_db',db,'file');return[{payload:db},{payload:db},{payload:'Liste RFID: '+db.length+' badge(s)'},null,null];}if(uid) global.set('selectedUid',uid,'file');if(action==='read'){if(!uid) return [null,null,{payload:'Erreur: UID vide pour lecture'},null,null];let found=db.find(x=>normalizeUid(x.uid)===uid);if(!found) return [null,null,{payload:'Badge '+uid+' introuvable dans '+db.length+' badge(s)'},null,null];return [null,null,{payload:'Badge trouvé: '+found.name+' ('+uid+')'},{payload:found},null];}if(action==='delete'){if(!uid) return [null,null,{payload:'Erreur: UID vide pour suppression'},null,null];let before=db.length;db=db.filter(x=>normalizeUid(x.uid)!==uid);global.set('rfid_db',db,'file');let dbJson=JSON.stringify(db);return[{payload:db},{payload:db},{payload:'Badge '+uid+' supprimé ('+before+' → '+db.length+')'},null,{topic:'sas/rfid/db',payload:dbJson,retain:true}];}if(action==='save'){let d=(p.data&&typeof p.data==='object')?p.data:p;let saveUid=normalizeUid(p.uid||d.uid||'');let name=String(d.name||'').trim();let startDate=cleanDateOnly(d.startDate);let startTime=cleanTimeOnly(d.startTime);let endDate=cleanDateOnly(d.endDate);let endTime=cleanTimeOnly(d.endTime);let maxUses=parseInt(String(d.maxUses!==undefined?d.maxUses:0),10);if(isNaN(maxUses)||maxUses<0) maxUses=0;let enabled=String(d.enabled!==undefined?d.enabled:'true')==='true';let allowedFrom=toEpochLocal(startDate,startTime);let allowedTo=toEpochLocal(endDate,endTime);if(!saveUid) return [null,null,{payload:'Erreur: UID obligatoire'},null,null];if(!name) return [null,null,{payload:'Erreur: Nom obligatoire'},null,null];if(!startDate||!startTime||!endDate||!endTime) return [null,null,{payload:'Erreur: date et heure début/fin obligatoires'},null,null];if(allowedTo<=allowedFrom) return [null,null,{payload:'Erreur: la fin doit être après le début. Le même jour est autorisé si l’heure fin > heure début.'},null,null];let idx=db.findIndex(x=>normalizeUid(x.uid)===saveUid);let actionText='créé';if(idx>=0){let usedCount=Number(db[idx].usedCount||0);db[idx]={uid:saveUid,name,enabled,startDate,startTime,endDate,endTime,allowedFrom,allowedTo,maxUses,usedCount};actionText='modifié';}else{db.push({uid:saveUid,name,enabled,startDate,startTime,endDate,endTime,allowedFrom,allowedTo,maxUses,usedCount:0});}global.set('rfid_db',db,'file');let found=db.find(x=>normalizeUid(x.uid)===saveUid);let dbJson=JSON.stringify(db);return[{payload:db},{payload:db},{payload:'✓ Badge '+saveUid+' '+actionText+' | Total: '+db.length+' badge(s)'},{payload:found},{topic:'sas/rfid/db',payload:dbJson,retain:true}];}return [null,null,{payload:'Action inconnue: '+action},null,null];

Theme CSS
format:
<style>
:root{
  --fp-bg:#f4f7fb;
  --fp-card:#ffffff;
  --fp-text:#0f172a;
  --fp-muted:#64748b;
  --fp-border:#dbeafe;
}
html.fp-dark{
  --fp-bg:#0f172a;
  --fp-card:#111827;
  --fp-text:#e5e7eb;
  --fp-muted:#94a3b8;
  --fp-border:#334155;
}
.nr-dashboard-theme md-content{max-width:100%!important;background:var(--fp-bg)!important;color:var(--fp-text)!important}
.nr-dashboard-cardcontainer{width:100%!important;max-width:100%!important}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-template{width:100%!important}
.nr-dashboard-theme .nr-dashboard-cardpanel{max-width:100%!important}
div.nr-dashboard-tab{padding-left:10px!important;padding-right:10px!important;max-width:100%!important}
md-card{width:100%!important;max-width:100%!important;border-radius:22px!important;box-shadow:0 12px 32px rgba(15,23,42,.08)!important;background:var(--fp-card)!important;color:var(--fp-text)!important;border:1px solid var(--fp-border)!important}
</style>
<script>
(function(scope){
  function applyDark(v){
    if(v){ document.documentElement.classList.add('fp-dark'); }
    else { document.documentElement.classList.remove('fp-dark'); }
  }
  scope.$watch('msg',function(msg){
    if(!msg) return;
    if(msg.topic==='theme-dark') applyDark(!!msg.payload);
  });
})(scope);
</script>

name: Handle enroll + CRUD
func: function cleanDateOnly(v){if(v===undefined||v===null) return '';if(Object.prototype.toString.call(v)==='[object Date]'&&!isNaN(v)){let y=v.getFullYear();let m=String(v.getMonth()+1).padStart(2,'0');let d=String(v.getDate()).padStart(2,'0');return y+'-'+m+'-'+d;}v=String(v).trim();if(!v) return '';if(v.includes('T')) return v.substring(0,10);if(/^\d{4}-\d{2}-\d{2}$/.test(v)) return v;return '';}function cleanTimeOnly(v){if(v===undefined||v===null) return '';if(Object.prototype.toString.call(v)==='[object Date]'&&!isNaN(v)){let h=String(v.getHours()).padStart(2,'0');let m=String(v.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0');return h+':'+m;}v=String(v).trim();if(!v) return '';if(v.includes('T')){let m=v.match(/T(\d{2}):(\d{2})/);if(m) return m[1]+':'+m[2];}if(/^\d{2}:\d{2}:\d{2}$/.test(v)) return v.substring(0,5);if(/^\d{2}:\d{2}$/.test(v)) return v;return '';}function toEpochLocal(dateStr,timeStr){dateStr=cleanDateOnly(dateStr);timeStr=cleanTimeOnly(timeStr);if(!dateStr||!timeStr) return 0;let partsD=dateStr.split('-');let partsT=timeStr.split(':');let y=parseInt(partsD[0],10);let m=parseInt(partsD[1],10);let d=parseInt(partsD[2],10);let hh=parseInt(partsT[0],10);let mm=parseInt(partsT[1],10);let dt=new Date(y,m-1,d,hh,mm,0,0);if(isNaN(dt.getTime())) return 0;return Math.floor(dt.getTime()/1000);}let db=global.get('finger_db','file')||[];let p=msg.payload||{};if(msg.topic==='theme-dark'){return [null,null,null,null,null,{topic:'theme-dark',payload:!!msg.payload}];}if(p.action==='deleteSensor'){let id=parseInt(String(p.fingerId||'').trim(),10);if(isNaN(id)||id<1) return [null,null,{payload:'ID capteur invalide'},null,null,null];return [null,null,{payload:'Suppression capteur ID '+id},{topic:'sas/esp2/finger_sensor/cmd',payload:'DELETE:'+id},null,null];}if(p.action==='clearAllSensor'){global.set('pendingFingerRecord', null, 'file');return [null,null,{payload:'Vidage complet du capteur...'},{topic:'sas/esp2/finger_sensor/cmd',payload:'CLEAR_ALL'},{topic:'enrollStatus',payload:'base capteur en cours de vidage...'},null];}if(p.action==='startEnroll'){let d=p.data||{};let id=parseInt(String(d.fingerId||'').trim(),10);let name=String(d.name||'').trim();let startDate=cleanDateOnly(d.startDate);let startTime=cleanTimeOnly(d.startTime);let endDate=cleanDateOnly(d.endDate);let endTime=cleanTimeOnly(d.endTime);let maxUses=parseInt(String(d.maxUses!==undefined?d.maxUses:0),10);if(isNaN(maxUses)||maxUses<0) maxUses=0;let enabled=String(d.enabled!==undefined?d.enabled:'true')==='true';let allowedFrom=toEpochLocal(startDate,startTime);let allowedTo=toEpochLocal(endDate,endTime);if(isNaN(id)||id<1) return [null,null,{payload:'Erreur: ID empreinte obligatoire'},null,null,null];if(!name) return [null,null,{payload:'Erreur: Nom obligatoire'},null,null,null];if(!startDate||!startTime||!endDate||!endTime) return [null,null,{payload:'Erreur: date et heure début/fin obligatoires'},null,null,null];if(allowedTo<=allowedFrom) return [null,null,{payload:'Erreur: la fin doit être après le début'},null,null,null];global.set('pendingFingerRecord',{fingerId:id,name:name,enabled:enabled,startDate:startDate,startTime:startTime,endDate:endDate,endTime:endTime,allowedFrom:allowedFrom,allowedTo:allowedTo,maxUses:maxUses,usedCount:0},'file');return [null,null,{payload:'Démarrage enrôlement ID '+id},{topic:'sas/esp2/finger_sensor/cmd',payload:'ENROLL:'+id},{topic:'enrollStatus',payload:'mettre votre doigt sur le capteur'},null];}return [null,null,null,null,null,null];

name: Table actions
func: let db=global.get('finger_db','file')||[];let p=msg.payload||{};let fingerId=parseInt(String(p.fingerId||''),10);let action=String(p.action||'');if(isNaN(fingerId)) return [null,null,{payload:'ID invalide'},null,null];if(action==='select'){let found=db.find(x=>Number(x.fingerId)===fingerId)||{fingerId:fingerId};return [null,null,{payload:'Empreinte '+fingerId+' sélectionnée'},{topic:'loadRecord',payload:found},null];}if(action==='delete'){db=db.filter(x=>Number(x.fingerId)!==fingerId);global.set('finger_db',db,'file');return [{payload:db},{payload:db},{payload:'Empreinte '+fingerId+' supprimée'},{topic:'sas/finger/db',payload:JSON.stringify(db),retain:true},null];}if(action==='toggle'){let idx=db.findIndex(x=>Number(x.fingerId)===fingerId);if(idx<0) return [null,null,{payload:'Empreinte introuvable'},null,null];db[idx].enabled=!!p.enabled;global.set('finger_db',db,'file');return [{payload:db},{payload:db},{payload:'Empreinte '+fingerId+' '+(db[idx].enabled?'activée':'désactivée')},{topic:'sas/finger/db',payload:JSON.stringify(db),retain:true},{topic:'loadRecord',payload:db[idx]}];}return [null,null,{payload:'Action inconnue'},null,null];

name: Init DB if empty
func: let db=global.get('finger_db','file');if(!db){db=[];}global.set('finger_db',db,'file');let dbJson=JSON.stringify(db);return[{payload:db},{payload:db},{payload:'Base empreinte initialisée: '+db.length+' utilisateur(s)'},{topic:'sas/finger/db',payload:dbJson,retain:true},{topic:'theme-dark',payload:false}];

name: Use last UID
func:
function normalizeUid(uid){uid=String(uid||'').trim().toUpperCase();let out='';for(let c of uid){if((c>='0'&&c<='9')||(c>='A'&&c<='F'))out+=c;}return out;}
let p=msg.payload||{};if(p.action!=='useLast')return null;let uid=normalizeUid(global.get('lastScannedUid','file')||'');let door=global.get('lastScannedDoor','file')||'-';let db=global.get('rfid_db','file')||[];let found=db.find(x=>normalizeUid(x.uid)===uid)||{uid:uid,name:'',enabled:true,startDate:'',startTime:'',endDate:'',endTime:'',maxUses:0,usedCount:0,allowedDoors:['ALL']};return[{payload:uid},{payload:found},{payload:'UID repris: '+uid+' depuis '+door}];

name: Badge Editor Dynamic Doors
format:
Créer / Modifier badge

Aucune porte détectée. Vérifie que les ESP publient sas/doorX/state

name: Handle CRUD + ACL
func: function normalizeUid(uid){uid=String(uid||'').trim().toUpperCase();let out='';for(let c of uid){if((c>='0'&&c<='9')||(c>='A'&&c<='F'))out+=c;}return out;}function toEpoch(d,t){if(!d||!t)return 0;let dd=d.split('-');let tt=t.split(':');let dt=new Date(dd[0],dd[1]-1,dd[2],tt[0],tt[1],0,0);return Math.floor(dt.getTime()/1000);}let db=global.get('rfid_db','file')||[];let p=msg.payload||{};let action=p.action||'';let uid=normalizeUid(p.uid||'');if(action==='list'){return[{payload:db},{payload:db},{payload:'Liste '+db.length},{topic:'sas/rfid/db',payload:JSON.stringify(db),retain:true}];}if(action==='read'){let f=db.find(x=>normalizeUid(x.uid)===uid);return[null,null,{payload:f||{}},null];}if(action==='delete'){db=db.filter(x=>normalizeUid(x.uid)!==uid);global.set('rfid_db',db,'file');return[{payload:db},{payload:db},{payload:'Supprimé '+uid},{topic:'sas/rfid/db',payload:JSON.stringify(db),retain:true}];}if(action==='save'){let d=p.data||{};let allowedDoors=Array.isArray(d.allowedDoors)&&d.allowedDoors.length?d.allowedDoors:['ALL'];let obj={uid:uid,name:d.name||'',enabled:String(d.enabled)!=='false',startDate:d.startDate||'',startTime:d.startTime||'',endDate:d.endDate||'',endTime:d.endTime||'',allowedFrom:toEpoch(d.startDate,d.startTime),allowedTo:toEpoch(d.endDate,d.endTime),maxUses:parseInt(d.maxUses||0),usedCount:0,allowedDoors:allowedDoors};let idx=db.findIndex(x=>normalizeUid(x.uid)===uid);if(idx>=0){obj.usedCount=db[idx].usedCount||0;db[idx]=obj;}else db.push(obj);global.set('rfid_db',db,'file');return[{payload:db},{payload:db},{payload:'Sauvegardé '+uid},{topic:'sas/rfid/db',payload:JSON.stringify(db),retain:true}];}return null;
